name: Get cyspbot app token
description: Exchange a GitHub Actions OIDC token for a short-lived repository-scoped GitHub App installation token from cyspbot.

inputs:
  audience:
    description: Canonical GitHub App URL to request, such as https://github.com/apps/cyspbot.
    required: false
    default: https://github.com/apps/cyspbot
  cyspbot-url:
    description: Base URL for the cyspbot service.
    required: false
    default: https://cyspbot.chikachow.org
  resource:
    description: Canonical GitHub repository API URI to request, such as https://api.github.com/repos/owner/repo. Omitted by default.
    required: false
  scope:
    description: Space-delimited GitHub App permission scopes to request, such as contents:write pull_requests:write. Omitted by default.
    required: false

outputs:
  token:
    description: Short-lived GitHub App installation token.
  expires_at:
    description: Expiration timestamp for the minted installation token.

runs:
  using: node24
  main: dist/index.js
.github/workflows/release.yml
name: release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      prerelease:
        description: Publish a prerelease using the rc channel
        required: true
        default: false
        type: boolean

permissions:
  actions: write
  contents: read

jobs:
  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Validate release branch
        env:
          CURRENT_BRANCH: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          DEFAULT_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.repository.default_branch }}
        run: |
          if [[ "${CURRENT_BRANCH}" != "${DEFAULT_BRANCH}" ]]; then
            echo "Releases must be prepared from ${DEFAULT_BRANCH}, got ${CURRENT_BRANCH}" >&2
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Determine next version
        id: version
        env:
          PRERELEASE: ${{ inputs.prerelease }}
        run: |
          latest_tag="$(
            git tag --list \
              | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' \
              | sort -V \
              | tail -n 1 \
              || true
          )"

          if [[ -n "${latest_tag}" ]]; then
            parent_line="$(git rev-list --parents -n 1 "${latest_tag}")"
            read -r _ release_base _ <<<"${parent_line}"

            if [[ -n "${release_base}" ]]; then
              range="${release_base}..HEAD"
              echo "Comparing conventional commits since ${latest_tag} (source commit ${release_base})"
            else
              range="${latest_tag}..HEAD"
              echo "Latest release tag ${latest_tag} has no parent; comparing commits after the tagged root commit"
            fi
          else
            range="HEAD"
            echo "No previous semantic release tag found; using complete history"
          fi

          major=0
          minor=0
          patch=0
          breaking_header_pattern='^[[:alpha:]][[:alnum:]-]*(\([^)]+\))?!:'
          feat_pattern='^feat(\([^)]+\))?:'
          patch_pattern='^(fix|perf|chore)(\([^)]+\))?:'

          while IFS= read -r -d '' subject && IFS= read -r -d '' body; do
            if [[ "${subject}" =~ ${breaking_header_pattern} ]] || grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])BREAKING[ -]CHANGE:' <<<"${body}"; then
              major=1
              break
            fi

            if [[ "${subject}" =~ ${feat_pattern} ]]; then
              minor=1
              continue
            fi

            if [[ "${subject}" =~ ${patch_pattern} ]]; then
              patch=1
            fi
          done < <(git log -z --reverse --format='%s%x00%b' "${range}")

          if (( major == 0 && minor == 0 && patch == 0 )); then
            echo "No releasable conventional commits found since ${latest_tag:-repository start}" >&2
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -n "${latest_tag}" ]]; then
            version_core="${latest_tag#v}"
          else
            version_core="0.0.0"
          fi

          IFS=. read -r current_major current_minor current_patch <<<"${version_core}"

          if (( current_major == 0 )); then
            if (( major == 1 )); then
              next_stable_version="v0.$((current_minor + 1)).0"
            else
              next_stable_version="v0.${current_minor}.$((current_patch + 1))"
            fi
          elif (( major == 1 )); then
            next_stable_version="v$((current_major + 1)).0.0"
          elif (( minor == 1 )); then
            next_stable_version="v${current_major}.$((current_minor + 1)).0"
          else
            next_stable_version="v${current_major}.${current_minor}.$((current_patch + 1))"
          fi

          next_version="${next_stable_version}"

          if [[ "${PRERELEASE}" == "true" ]]; then
            # shellcheck disable=SC2016
            escaped_stable_version="$(printf '%s\n' "${next_stable_version}" | sed 's/[.[\*^$()+?{|]/\\&/g')"
            latest_prerelease_tag="$(
              git tag --list \
                | grep -E "^${escaped_stable_version}-rc\\.[0-9]+$" \
                | sort -V \
                | tail -n 1 \
                || true
            )"

            if [[ -n "${latest_prerelease_tag}" ]]; then
              rc_number="${latest_prerelease_tag##*-rc.}"
              next_version="${next_stable_version}-rc.$((rc_number + 1))"
            else
              next_version="${next_stable_version}-rc.1"
            fi
          fi

          {
            echo "version=${next_version}"
            echo "previous_tag=${latest_tag}"
          } >>"${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

          echo "Next version: ${next_version}"

      - name: Dispatch prepare-release workflow
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
          PREVIOUS_TAG: ${{ steps.version.outputs.previous_tag }}
          PRERELEASE: ${{ inputs.prerelease }}
          VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          REF_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
        run: |
          dispatch_flags=(
            --ref "${REF_NAME}"
            -f version="${VERSION}"
            -f prerelease="${PRERELEASE}"
          )

          if [[ -n "${PREVIOUS_TAG}" ]]; then
            dispatch_flags+=(-f previous-version="${PREVIOUS_TAG}")
          fi

          gh workflow run prepare-release.yml "${dispatch_flags[@]}"
.github/workflows/pnpm-up.yml
name: pnpm-up

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "15 9 * * *"
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

jobs:
  update:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: chikachow/cyspbot-app-token-action@8894f93a0c17b5a160dafa8df13a46c0399f80a8 # v0.0.4
        id: cyspbot

      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@0ebf47130e4866e96fce0953f49152a61190b271 # v6.0.9
        with:
          run_install: false

      - uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version-file: .nvmrc
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm up -r

      - run: pnpm dedupe

      - uses: peter-evans/create-pull-request@5f6978faf089d4d20b00c7766989d076bb2fc7f1 # v8.1.1
        with:
          token: ${{ steps.cyspbot.outputs.token }}
          commit-message: "chore(deps): bump transitive dependencies"
          title: "chore(deps): bump transitive dependencies"
          body: ""
          branch: "deps/pnpm-up"
          sign-commits: true
.github/workflows/prepare-release.yml
name: prepare-release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        description: Full semantic version tag to publish, for example v1.2.3
        required: true
        type: string
      prerelease:
        description: Publish as a prerelease
        required: true
        default: false
        type: boolean
      previous-version:
        description: Previous release tag to use as the release notes start tag
        required: false
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  prepare-release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@0ebf47130e4866e96fce0953f49152a61190b271 # v6.0.9
        with:
          run_install: false

      - uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version-file: .nvmrc
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - run: pnpm run check

      - name: Validate requested version
        env:
          PRERELEASE: ${{ inputs.prerelease }}
          VERSION: ${{ inputs.version }}
        run: |
          if [[ ! "${VERSION}" =~ ^v([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)(-rc\.([0-9]+))?$ ]]; then
            echo "Expected version like v1.2.3 or v1.2.3-rc.1, got ${VERSION}" >&2
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ "${PRERELEASE}" == "true" && ! "${VERSION}" =~ -rc\.([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
            echo "Expected prerelease version like v1.2.3-rc.1 when prerelease=true, got ${VERSION}" >&2
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ "${PRERELEASE}" != "true" && "${VERSION}" =~ -rc\.([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
            echo "Expected stable version like v1.2.3 when prerelease=false, got ${VERSION}" >&2
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Create release commit
        env:
          VERSION: ${{ inputs.version }}
        run: |
          git config user.name github-actions[bot]
          git config user.email 41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com

          git add -f dist action.yml
          git commit -m "build(release): bundle ${VERSION}"

      - name: Publish release tag
        env:
          VERSION: ${{ inputs.version }}
        run: |
          git tag "${VERSION}"
          git push origin "refs/tags/${VERSION}"

      - name: Update compatibility tags
        if: ${{ !inputs.prerelease }}
        env:
          VERSION: ${{ inputs.version }}
        run: |
          [[ "${VERSION}" =~ ^(v[0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)$ ]]

          major_tag="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
          minor_tag="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}.${BASH_REMATCH[2]}"

          git tag -f "${minor_tag}"
          git tag -f "${major_tag}"

          git push --force origin "refs/tags/${minor_tag}"
          git push --force origin "refs/tags/${major_tag}"

      - name: Create GitHub release
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
          PREVIOUS_VERSION: ${{ inputs.previous-version }}
          VERSION: ${{ inputs.version }}
          TARGET_COMMIT: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          notes_flags=(--generate-notes)
          prerelease_flags=()

          if [[ "${{ inputs.prerelease }}" == "true" ]]; then
            prerelease_flags+=(--prerelease)
          fi

          if [[ -n "${PREVIOUS_VERSION}" ]]; then
            if [[ ! "${PREVIOUS_VERSION}" =~ ^v([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
              echo "Expected previous-version like v1.2.3, got ${PREVIOUS_VERSION}" >&2
              exit 1
            fi

            git rev-parse --verify "refs/tags/${PREVIOUS_VERSION}" >/dev/null
            notes_flags+=(--notes-start-tag "${PREVIOUS_VERSION}")
          fi

          gh release create "${VERSION}" --target "${TARGET_COMMIT}" --verify-tag "${notes_flags[@]}" "${prerelease_flags[@]}"
.github/workflows/ci.yml
name: ci

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0

      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@0ebf47130e4866e96fce0953f49152a61190b271 # v6.0.9
        with:
          run_install: false

      - uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6.4.0
        with:
          node-version-file: .nvmrc
          cache: pnpm

      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - run: pnpm run check

  actionlint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0 # v7.0.0
      - uses: rhysd/actionlint@914e7df21a07ef503a81201c76d2b11c789d3fca # v1.7.12
.github/dependabot.yml
version: 2

updates:
  - package-ecosystem: github-actions
    directory: /
    schedule:
      interval: weekly
      day: monday
      time: "16:30"
      timezone: "Australia/Sydney"
    cooldown:
      default-days: 2
    commit-message:
      prefix: "chore(github/workflows)"

  - package-ecosystem: npm
    directory: /
    schedule:
      interval: daily
      time: "16:30"
      timezone: "Australia/Sydney"
    cooldown:
      default-days: 2
    versioning-strategy: increase
    commit-message:
      prefix: "chore(deps)"
      prefix-development: "chore(deps-dev)"

input.cmd: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm typecheck
